headline: Data center boom boosts communications infra companies but supply catching up
summary: Investing.com -- Demand for data centers and internet infrastructure is outpacing supply benefitting U.S. communications infrastructure companies, but the imbalance is likely to ease in the next few years.

raw.headline: Data center boom boosts communications infra companies but supply catching up
